zh.lifeSummary: 當Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow於1305年出生在英國英格蘭史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓時，她的父親Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow32歲，母親Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti31歲。她於1325年與Hugh De Hill在英國英格蘭史洛普爾考特 本 希爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1372年在她的家鄉享年67歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭史洛普爾廷頓。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow于1305年出生在英国英格兰史洛普爾馬可特 德雷頓时，她的父亲Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow32岁，母亲Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti31岁。她于1325年与Hugh De Hill在英国英格兰史洛普爾考特 本 希爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1372年在她的家乡享年67岁，埋葬在英国英格兰史洛普爾廷頓。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Eleanor
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

variants.name: Ellenor
meanings: Variant spelling of   Eleanor  , the result of blending with   Ellen .

variants.name: Elenor
meanings: From an Old French respelling of the Old Provençal name Alienor. This has sometimes been taken as a derivative of Helen , but it is more probably of Germanic derivation (the first element being ali ‘other, foreign’ the second is obscure). The name was introduced to England by Eleanor of Aquitaine ( 1122–1204 ), who came from Aquitaine in south-west France to be the wife of King Henry II . It was also borne by Eleanor of Provence, the wife of Henry III , and Eleanor of Castile, wife of Edward I .

en.lifeSummary: When Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow was born in 1305, in Market Drayton, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom, her father, Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow, was 32 and her mother, Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti, was 31. She married Hugh De Hill in 1325, in Court of Hill, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1372, in her hometown, at the age of 67, and was buried in Whittington, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow est née en 1305, à Market Drayton, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow, avait 32 ans et sa mère, Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti, avait 31 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh De Hill en 1325, à Court of Hill, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1372, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 67 ans, et a été enterrée à Whittington, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

Sie hat 1325 in Court of Hill, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom Hugh De Hill geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. it.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow è nata il nel 1305 nel Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow, aveva 32 anni e sua madre, Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti, aveva 31 anni. Lei sposato Hugh De Hill nel 1325, nel Court of Hill, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1372, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 67 anni, e fu sepolta a Whittington, Shropshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslowが1305年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアマーケト ドレイトンで生まれた時，父Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslowは32歳，母Barroness Alicia Filia De Robertiは31歳であった。1325年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアコウルト オフ ヒルでHugh De Hillと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1372年に故郷で67歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアウィッティントンにて埋葬された。

ko.Court of Hill, Nash, Parish of Burford,: 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쿠르트 프 힐
ko.lifeSummary: Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow(이)가 1305년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 마크트 드라이턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow(은)는 32세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti(은)는 31세였다. 그녀는 1325년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 쿠르트 프 힐에서 Hugh De Hill(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1372년 그녀의 고향에서 67세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 휘틴그턴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow nasceu em 1305, em Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow, tinha 32 anos e sua mãe, Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti, tinha 31 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh De Hill em 1325, em Court of Hill, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1372, em sua cidade natal, com 67 anos, e foi sepultada em Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.Stratford Upon Avon Warwickshire England: стратфорд он авон, варвиккшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow родилась в 1305 г. в местности маркет дреитон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow было 32 года, а матери, которую звали Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti, 31. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh De Hill в 1325 г. в местности коурт оф хилл, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1372 г. в её родном городе в возрасте 67 лет и была похоронена в местности уиттингтон, шропшир, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Lady Eleanor de Wlonkeslow nació en 1305, en Market Drayton, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Sir Knight Hugh De Wlonkeslow, tenía 32 años y su mamá, Barroness Alicia Filia De Roberti, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Hugh De Hill en 1325, en Court of Hill, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1372, en su pueblo, a la edad de 67 años, y fue sepultada en Whittington, Shropshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
